Description: Build and stabilize the core display engine including rendering, layering, and interaction. Includes map initialization, layer rendering, layer ordering, opacity controls, and popup system.
Develop reusable display profiles for consistent configuration. Includes profile JSON structure, profile loading, profile validation, and profile reuse.
Create the dashboard as the display manager workspace. Includes configuration UI, live preview, profile selection, dispatch capability, and triage for unsupported features.
Support multiple basemap providers. Includes OSM, imagery providers, and future adapters such as Sentinel-derived imagery.
Support external imagery sources. Includes tile providers, attribution handling, and adapter design.
Build in-house imagery processing capability. Includes ingestion, preprocessing, reprojection, clipping, and enhancement.
Convert imagery into tile services. Includes tile pyramid generation, storage, and access structure.
Serve imagery to display engine and programs. Includes tile endpoints, integration with display engine, and performance considerations.
Develop building extraction and dataset. Includes digitization, validation, and improvement workflows.
Develop land cover classification. Includes classification logic, dataset generation, and refinement.
Develop water body detection. Includes extraction, validation, and dataset improvements.
Ensure accuracy and reliability of foundational data. Includes QA workflows, validation rules, and review cycles.
Develop address system based on buildings. Includes address points, building linkage, popup display, and refinement.
Strengthen relationship between addresses and buildings. Includes spatial linking, validation, and support for multiple addresses per building.
Prepare framework for new composite programs. Includes program templates, integration patterns, and reuse of foundational layers.
Build user-facing web platform. Includes homepage, navigation, and content surfaces.
Integrate display engine into frontend. Includes embedding viewer, UI controls, and interaction design.
Build address search UI. Includes search bar, results display, and interaction with the map.
Build CI/CD pipeline. Includes GitHub Actions, deployment scripts, and automation.
Serve platform via nginx. Includes static serving, routing, and domain setup.
Manage services. Includes service definitions, restart policies, and logging.
Monitor system health. Includes logs, alerts, and performance checks.
Implement governance lifecycle. Includes intake, review, approval, and execution tracking.
Define system policies. Includes rules, constraints, and enforcement model.
Integrate service availability matrix. Includes tracking maturity and readiness metrics.
Track system history and reporting. Includes activity logs, summaries, and insights.
